name: workbench
description: Requirements-first software workbench built around a lightweight .work/ ledger, research and interactive UI mockups, judgment-led execution, and compact release summaries.

interface.longDescription: A lightweight .work/ ledger where natural-language requests and project conventions guide requirements, research, interactive UI walkthroughs, design, implementation, review, parking, and release summaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Workbench to understand this request, gather unresolved requirements, and carry the requested work to an appropriate verified outcome.
